title: Court, Municipal, and License Clerks
description: Perform clerical duties for courts of law, municipalities, or governmental licensing agencies and bureaus. May prepare docket of cases to be called; secure information for judges and court; prepare draft agendas or bylaws for town or city council; answer official correspondence; keep fiscal records and accounts; issue licenses or permits; and record data, administer tests, or collect fees.

tasks.text: Evaluate information on applications to verify completeness and accuracy and to determine whether applicants are qualified to obtain desired licenses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Perform administrative tasks, such as answering telephone calls, filing court documents, or maintaining office supplies or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Verify the authenticity of documents, such as foreign identification or immigration documents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record and edit the minutes of meetings and distribute to appropriate officials or staff members.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Question applicants to obtain required information, such as name, address, or age, and record data on prescribed forms.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Issue public notification of all official activities or meetings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record and maintain all vital and fiscal records and accounts.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Record case dispositions, court orders, or arrangements made for payment of court fees.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Answer questions or provide advice to the public regarding licensing policies, procedures, or regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare meeting agendas or packets of related information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine legal documents submitted to courts for adherence to laws or court procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare ordinances, resolutions, or proclamations so that they can be executed, recorded, archived, or distributed.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Answer inquiries from the general public regarding judicial procedures, court appearances, trial dates, adjournments, outstanding warrants, summonses, subpoenas, witness fees, or payment of fines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Code information on license applications for entry into computers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare documents recording the outcomes of court proceedings.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Perform budgeting duties, such as assisting in budget preparation, expenditure review, or budget administration.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and issue orders of the court, such as probation orders, release documentation, sentencing information, or summonses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform record checks on past or current licensees, as required by investigations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform general office duties, such as taking or transcribing dictation, typing or proofreading correspondence, distributing or filing official forms, or scheduling appointments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Instruct parties about timing of court appearances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Respond to requests for information from the public, other municipalities, state officials, or state and federal legislative offices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate or maintain office tracking systems for correspondence or follow-up actions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train other workers or coordinate their work, as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research information in the municipal archives upon request of public officials or private citizens.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform contract administration duties, assisting with bid openings or the awarding of contracts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in the administration of municipal elections, such as preparation or distribution of ballots, appointment or training of election officers, or tabulation or certification of results.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Search files and contact witnesses, attorneys, or litigants to obtain information for the court.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Issue various permits and licenses, such as marriage, fishing, hunting, and dog licenses, and collect appropriate fees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan or direct the maintenance, filing, safekeeping, or computerization of all municipal documents.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare dockets or calendars of cases to be called.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
